name: finder-file-actions
title: Finder File Actions
description: Perform actions (move, copy, create) on selected Finder files and folders
author: pa1ar

commands.name: move-to-folder
commands.title: Move to Folder
commands.subtitle: Finder File Actions
commands.description: Move selected Finder files to a destination folder

commands.name: copy-to-folder
commands.title: Copy to Folder
commands.subtitle: Finder File Actions
commands.description: Copy selected Finder files to a destination folder

commands.name: create-folder
commands.title: Create Folder
commands.subtitle: Finder File Actions
commands.description: Create a new folder in the current Finder directory

commands.name: wrap-in-folder
commands.title: Wrap in Folder
commands.subtitle: Finder File Actions
commands.description: Create a new folder and move selected Finder files into it

commands.name: create-text-file
commands.title: Create Text File
commands.subtitle: Finder File Actions
commands.description: Create a text file with optional clipboard content

preferences.description: The maximum number of search results that should be returned
preferences.name: maxResults
preferences.title: Maximum Results

preferences.description: The maximum number of recent folders to remember
preferences.name: maxRecentFolders
preferences.title: Recent Folders Count
